deviations: Tests use one t.Run subtest per function instead of table-driven case slices described in the plan
Adds unplanned TestJSONSchema_invalidInput for non-struct input
Doc example uses validate hostname tag which is not mapped to schema keywords (example still demonstrates the API)
summary: The patch implements the planned JSONSchema API, cTag-based mapping, property-name resolution, documentation, and all nine specified tests in the intended files with only minor extras.
